verdict_summary: envelope rev2 (markdown outline card structure) still does NOT render warning — gamma SPA shows error 'Unable to complete request' and renders single empty placeholder card #1 with no title/body/warning text.

evidence.outline_card_title: (empty — only number '1' shown, no title, no body)
evidence.console_errors_excerpt: [PromptAndOutlineSettings] error generating outline: Unable to complete request — at 0ou9ekajjymyv.js:13 with stack trace through 0ntt4u~s2ausf.js, 00_3fxre00yx8.js (await chain). Prompt was clearly submitted (URL became gamma.app/create/generate/3n243695kxrb6bb). 1 error + 1 warning total in console.

recommendation: Envelope rev2 markdown outline card wrapper (--- N + # heading + body) is INSUFFICIENT. gamma SPA's PromptAndOutlineSettings handler rejects the SSE payload with 'Unable to complete request' before any markdown parsing occurs — the failure is upstream of card rendering. Next investigation: capture HAR of /ai/v2/* SSE stream to confirm exact bytes delivered; compare against a known-good gamma SSE response (real outline generation) to identify schema mismatch (e.g. missing JSON envelope, wrong content-type, wrong event names like 'outline.start'/'outline.card'/'outline.complete', missing terminator). The plain markdown wrap is likely missing required JSON event-frame metadata that gamma's SPA expects.
notes: S2 RRN decode preservation confirmed (no '880101-1234567' decode visible anywhere). Page successfully transitioned to /generate/3n243695kxrb6bb (outline session created). Console error is identical pattern to #748 (Unable to complete request). UI fell back to its 'add empty card' state with credit count unchanged (320). HAR not captured this run (DevTools Network tab was not preloaded with recording before submit; recommend pre-arming Network tab in next retest if HAR needed). Total elapsed under 4 min.
